summary: TaxiG Platform - Iteration 3 Testing. Verified driver notification polling fix and Navy+Orange theme. Backend: 33/33 tests passed. Frontend: All 3 dashboards working correctly with proper theme.
critical_code_review_comments: Driver notification polling fix verified: useEffect now only depends on [isOnline], using refs for position/calculateRoute to prevent interval reset on GPS updates
Navy Blue + Orange theme correctly applied across all pages (landing, client, driver, admin dashboards)
OpenStreetMap tiles working correctly on all map views
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_rate.backend: 100% (33/33 tests passed - 24 API tests + 9 notification flow tests)

seed_data_creation: Test accounts verified. 44 chauffeurs in database, 41 online.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Driver notification polling fix verified - uses refs to prevent interval reset on GPS updates. Navy+Orange theme applied correctly. Backend endpoints all functional.

driver_notification_polling_fix.details: Verified useEffect only depends on [isOnline], refs used for position/calculateRoute. 3-second polling interval is stable.

driver_login.details: Login successful, redirects to dashboard with map

driver_dashboard.details: Map displays with OpenStreetMap tiles, pointer button works, course info panel shows correctly, Navy+Orange theme applied

driver_go_online.details: Pointer toggle works, status changes between online/offline

driver_accept_course.details: Driver can accept course, status changes to 'assigned'

driver_start_complete_course.details: Driver can start and complete courses, final price calculated correctly

driver_revenus.details: Revenue endpoint returns correct data structure

client_dashboard.details: Map displays with 41 active chauffeurs, booking panel visible, Navy+Orange theme

admin_dashboard.details: Shows 44 chauffeurs, 4 clients, 23 courses, 26087.66€ revenue, recent activity

theme_verification.details: Navy Blue (#0A1628) + Orange (#FF6B00) theme correctly applied across all pages

map_tiles.details: OpenStreetMap tiles loading correctly on all map views

elapsed_time_counter.details: Timer visible on driver dashboard during active course (0:00 shown)

polling_fix_verification.issue: Driver had to refresh page to see ride requests
polling_fix_verification.root_cause: Polling useEffect had [isOnline, incomingRequest?.id, currentCourse?.status, position, calculateRoute] as dependencies, causing interval reset on every GPS update
polling_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed to only [isOnline] dependency, using useRef for position/calculateRoute values
polling_fix_verification.verification: Code review confirmed fix at lines 410-463 of ChauffeurDashboard.jsx. Refs setup at lines 141-150.
